summary: Jerry’s quirky vocal crack turns into a shredding Bertha; recording quality not discussed but the performance is praised.
review: The sole reviewer loved this show, highlighting Jerry Garcia’s brief voice‑crack on “Bertha” that quickly turned into a fiery guitar solo. No details about the source or clarity of the audio were given, so the technical side remains unknown, but the musical moment was clearly a high point.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 5‑star review focuses on a standout performance of Bertha; no recording details are provided, so rating leans heavily on the positive show impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about soundboard vs. audience or clarity; assumed listenable based on overall high rating.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Insufficient information to evaluate set pacing or flow.
